questions: What is the MD5 hash of the main executable of the rhythm game downloaded by the victim? (E: 38fc27eae9f85049ee8a002a38c794b7)
What are the Key and IV used by the rhythm game to encrypt and decrypt the beatmaps? (Format: Key_IV) (E: Thisiskey@123456_Thisisiv@1234567)
What is the MD5 hash of the malicious payload bytecode ultimately decrypted by the rhythm game? (E: ff418d8b23b59a2a88f013c68f3c4873)
The attacker used the rhythm game to implant a C2 client on the victim's computer. What is the listening port of the C2 server it connects back to? (E: 9999)
During its execution, the C2 client read a local file on the victim's machine for subsequent communication encryption. What is the absolute path of this file? (E: C:\Users\Public\a.txt)
Following up on the previous question, what was the original MD5 hash of this file when it was read? (E: dcc596761e0273d4531c1e0af3f02462)
After establishing the C2 connection, what was the first command issued and executed by the attacker via the C2 server? (E: dir)
What was the return result of the whoami command executed by the attacker? (E: aurasec\pig)
The attacker created a new user on the victim's computer. What are the username and password of this user? (Format: Name_Password) (E: Aura_123456)
By analyzing the retrieved files, what is the 7th word of the MetaMask wallet seed phrase saved by the victim? (E: watermelon)
What is the victim's Ethereum wallet address? (E: 0x55897c6Af89Ef014EeC7BF031c26f55C23bF4367)
special_message: Following the above investigation, the relevant personnel have successfully identified the attacker and retrieved some files from the attacker's computer, specifically the archive Evidence.zip. Extraction password: 18ae3a54-1c1a-4f44-adca-9884acb80d9a
